"Convoys of heavy-duty trucks barreling across the Arabian desert have become an escape valve for the global economy. In a mechanized revival of the caravans of goods-laden camels that once sustained Arabian commerce, highways, railroads and ports in Saudi Arabia, the United Arab Emirates and Oman have been transformed into an emergency logistics lifeline, circumventing the Strait of Hormuz waterway. After the U.S. and Israel attacked Iran, Bob Wilt, CEO of Saudi Arabian state-controlled mining company Maaden, dispatched executives to Red Sea ports and, within two weeks, lined up rail and truck operators to move fertilizer across the kingdom. The key ingredient: Lots of trucks, mostly running around the clock, with two drivers each. “Six hundred became 1,600, became 2,000; now we’ve got 3,500 trucks running from the Gulf to the Red Sea,” said Wilt, a former executive at aluminum producer Alcoa." https://www. wsj.com/world/middle-east/the- new-route-around-hormuz-involves-a-massive-convoy-of-trucks-fdc306c3 # MiddleEast # StraitOfHormuz # Iran # USA # Israel

…The # WarPowers Resolution — a Vietnam-era # law that mandates congressional authorization for any declaration of armed conflict —requires the admin to end hostilities after 60 days of fighting unless # Congress gives its explicit approval. Wednesday’s vote is the first time lawmakers have considered a bill to end the # IranWar since that deadline passed earlier this month. # TrumpsWar # IranWar # US # Iran # war # Trump # geopolitics # NationalSecurity # MiddleEast # economy # inflation # CostOfLiving # oil

After committing a genocide in Gaza, and war crimes in Lebanon, Yemen, Iran, and Syria, is Netanyahu’s government collapsing ahead of elections? Benjamin Netanyahu’s ruling coalition submitted a proposal to dissolve the Knesset and hold early elections, signaling deepening political turmoil inside "Israel" as pressure mounts over the ongoing wars in Gaza, Lebanon, and Iran. The move comes amid growing anger from ultra-Orthodox parties who are saying that Netanyahu is failing to secure permanent military service exemptions for religious students, threatening the collapse of his coalition government. If approved, the legislation would trigger elections within 90 days, potentially bringing Israeli settlers to the polls by August as Netanyahu faces mounting criticism over the failure to achieve what he called “total victory” against Hamas, Hezbollah, and Iran after more than two years of regional war. Opposition leaders Yair Lapid and Naftali Bennett announced a joint electoral alliance aimed at challenging Netanyahu, while polls suggest the Israeli political scene remains deeply fragmented with no clear governing majority. # Israel # Palestine # Gaza # Genocide # Netanyahu # Syria # Hamas # Iran # Yemen # Lebanon # Hezbollah

"Duizend Palestijnen met Belgisch visum zitten vast in Gaza, maar regering plant geen nieuwe evacuaties Zowat duizend Palestijnen met een visum voor België zitten vast in Gaza, maar ons land plant voorlopig geen evacuaties meer. Dat schrijft De Standaard vrijdag. Uit cijfers die de krant opvroeg bij Buitenlandse Zaken blijkt dat zich momenteel een duizendtal Palestijnen in Gaza bevinden die een visum hebben om naar België te reizen. Onder hen is één Belg van enkele maanden oud. De meeste visa dienen voor gezinshereniging. Een visum geeft niet automatisch recht op een evacuatie met hulp van de overheid. Die is er in het geval van Gaza alleen voor de partner en minderjarige kinderen van Belgen en erkende vluchtelingen. Die voorwaarden klopte de vorige regering af. De huidige regering-De Wever voegde sinds april 2025 geen mensen meer toe aan de evacuatielijst. Evacuaties kosten "aanzienlijke middelen" en leggen "grote druk op de betrokken diensten", verneemt De Standaard van het kabinet van minister van Buitenlandse Zaken Maxime Prévot (Les Engagés). België behandelt evacuaties als een uitzonderlijke maatregel in noodsituaties." https://www. demorgen.be/snelnieuws/live-ug ent-laat-bezetting-voorlopig-toe-na-overleg-met-actievoerders-europa-gaat-israelische-kolonisten-sanctioneren-ook-bijkomende-maatregelen-tegen-toplui-hamas~ba7f8873/ # belgie # gaza # visum

"Drie bestuurders nemen ontslag bij Bozar na programmatie van omstreden Israëlische dirigent Lahav Shani De beslissing van Bozar om de Israëlische dirigent Lahav Shani en de Münchner Philharmoniker volgend seizoen te programmeren, leidt tot drie ontslagen in de raad van bestuur. Acteur en filmregisseur Mohamed Ouachen, curator en ondervoorzitter Els Silvrants-Barclay en minister van Staat Jos Geysels (Groen) dienen uit protest hun ontslag in. Persagentschap Belga maakte woensdag bekend dat Ouachen opstapt. Lid blijven van het bestuur zou voor hem aanvoelen als "goedkeuring geven" aan iets wat hij resoluut afwijst. "Lahav Shani is niet zomaar een dirigent", schrijft hij op sociale media. “Hij is muzikaal directeur van het Israëlisch Filharmonisch Orkest, een land waarvan de daden door Amnesty International als genocide en door het Internationaal Gerechtshof als apartheid worden bestempeld. Ook Geysels en Silvrants-Barclay leggen hun mandaat neer. Dat blijkt uit onderzoek van De Standaard. Geysels wijst erop dat de situatie in het Midden-Oosten sinds de Gentse heisa rond Shani vorig jaar alleen maar verslechterd is." .,,.,.,. https://www. demorgen.be/snelnieuws/drie-be stuurders-nemen-ontslag-bij-bozar-na-programmatie-van-omstreden-israelische-dirigent-lahav-shani~b432be0e/ # muziek # belgie # gaza # palestine # israel

After committing a genocide in Gaza, and war crimes in Lebanon, Yemen, Iran, and Syria, is Netanyahu’s government collapsing ahead of elections? Benjamin Netanyahu’s ruling coalition submitted a proposal to dissolve the Knesset and hold early elections, signaling deepening political turmoil inside "Israel" as pressure mounts over the ongoing wars in Gaza, Lebanon, and Iran. The move comes amid growing anger from ultra-Orthodox parties who are saying that Netanyahu is failing to secure permanent military service exemptions for religious students, threatening the collapse of his coalition government. If approved, the legislation would trigger elections within 90 days, potentially bringing Israeli settlers to the polls by August as Netanyahu faces mounting criticism over the failure to achieve what he called “total victory” against Hamas, Hezbollah, and Iran after more than two years of regional war. Opposition leaders Yair Lapid and Naftali Bennett announced a joint electoral alliance aimed at challenging Netanyahu, while polls suggest the Israeli political scene remains deeply fragmented with no clear governing majority. # Israel # Palestine # Gaza # Genocide # Netanyahu # Syria # Hamas # Iran # Yemen # Lebanon # Hezbollah

After committing a genocide in Gaza, and war crimes in Lebanon, Yemen, Iran, and Syria, is Netanyahu’s government collapsing ahead of elections? Benjamin Netanyahu’s ruling coalition submitted a proposal to dissolve the Knesset and hold early elections, signaling deepening political turmoil inside "Israel" as pressure mounts over the ongoing wars in Gaza, Lebanon, and Iran. The move comes amid growing anger from ultra-Orthodox parties who are saying that Netanyahu is failing to secure permanent military service exemptions for religious students, threatening the collapse of his coalition government. If approved, the legislation would trigger elections within 90 days, potentially bringing Israeli settlers to the polls by August as Netanyahu faces mounting criticism over the failure to achieve what he called “total victory” against Hamas, Hezbollah, and Iran after more than two years of regional war. Opposition leaders Yair Lapid and Naftali Bennett announced a joint electoral alliance aimed at challenging Netanyahu, while polls suggest the Israeli political scene remains deeply fragmented with no clear governing majority. # Israel # Palestine # Gaza # Genocide # Netanyahu # Syria # Hamas # Iran # Yemen # Lebanon # Hezbollah

Horseshoe theory is bullshit. Liberalism is a disease. Liberal is, in fact, an insult used by fascists and leftists alike, for different reasons. Liberals and fascists are both morally corrupt and spiritually bankrupt. But these are just descriptors. Fascists insult liberals for weakness, diversity, proceduralism, or insufficient ethnonational purity. Leftists insult liberals for collaboration with domination while pretending neutrality. Same word, different indictment. The key distinction is function. A liberal government may speak of human rights while backing massacres. A fascist movement may discard the human-rights language and embrace domination more openly. Different rhetoric, sometimes overlapping material outcomes. I won't speak about theory in a vacuum, but let's talk about historical and material conditions and the imperial boomerang across settler-colonial states, imperial powers, and postcolonial formations shaped by empire. Let's start there. – an Indonesian in Indonesia (In case you think the political spectrum translates cleanly to every corner of the world while global power structures heavily rely on exploitative systems of racial and gender hierarchy and extraction, think again, and this is me being polite) # politics # imperialism # westernimperialism # malesupremacy # authoritarianism # womensrights # muslimvoice # Indonesia # Palestine # Iran # Yemen # WestPapua # Cuba # TimorLeste # Sudan # Congo # Rwanda # SaudiArabia # UAE # Venezuela # Nigeria # Rohingya # Uyghur # China # DPRK # SouthKorea # Japan # ComfortWomen # Kurds # Kurdistan # Syria # Lebanon # Libya # Afghanistan # Iraq
